meta.name: Edgy Beverage
meta.description: An aggressive, bold, and humorous e-commerce design for an edgy beverage brand. It features high-contrast typography, provocative imagery, and a mix of full-width banners and clean product grids.

fonts.sans: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Header is transparent and overlays the hero image. Features a logo on the far left, centered navigation links, and icon-only account/cart buttons on the right.

footer.description: If you are visually-impaired and having difficulty with our website, call us...
footer.notes: Multi-column layout. Left column includes social follow stats (very large text/icons) and a newsletter signup with country selector and legal checkbox. Right columns contain standard footer links (Information, Company, Shop). Includes a bottom row with secondary links, copyright, and a currency/country selector dropdown.

productCard.notes: Clean product presentation. Images are cut out on white or light grey backgrounds. Typography is distinct: bold uppercase titles, small subtitle (e.g., 'Sparkling Energy'), and a small pill badge (e.g., '5 Calories'). 'ADD TO CART' button is text-only, bold, uppercase, positioned below the price on merch cards.

productGrid.notes: Two distinct grid styles: a 3-column featured beverage section with centered text, and a 4-column merch section with left-aligned text.

featuredProducts.heading: MURDER YOUR THIRST
featuredProducts.notes: Centered, high-impact uppercase headline. Displays 3 key products with tall can imagery, centered titles, subtitles, and calorie badges. Followed by a solid black 'SHOP NOW' button.

design.styling: Minimal padding, sits above the header

content.headline: Promotional shipping offer based on threshold

sections.name: hero-carousel

design.styling: Tall section (approx 70-80vh). Carousel indicators at bottom.

content.cta: Single solid white button with black text, sharp square corners, uppercase.

media.description: Humorous composite image showing a person drinking from an oversized faucet attached to a house, with a bold promotional logo in the center.

sections.notes: The focal point is the imagery and central promotional graphic. Header sits transparently over top.

sections.name: mission-banner
sections.layout: Full width image with centered text overlay

design.background: Image with dark overlay or natural darkness

content.headline: Aggressive environmental statement about recycling
content.cta: Transparent button with white border and white text (outline style), sharp corners.

media.description: Massive pile of crushed plastic water bottles, conveying waste.

content.specialElements: Brand logo variant ('Death to Plastic Bottles') positioned above the text.

sections.notes: Serves as a brand value statement breaking up the product grids.

sections.name: action-cards

design.styling: Large edge-to-edge blocks, no gap between columns.

content.cta: Bottom band of each card acts as a button: solid black with white text and a right-pointing chevron.

media.description: Gold detailed skull/crossbones logo on one card, gold handshake logo on the other.

sections.notes: Used for community/loyalty programs ('Join the club', 'Sell...'). High contrast.

content.headline: YOUR CART
content.body: Empty state message encouraging adding items.
content.cta: Solid black block button spanning full width of drawer.

sections.name: upsell-drawer
sections.layout: Nested within or adjacent to cart drawer
sections.notes: Cross-sell section typically found inside cart drawers to increase AOV.
